title: SQL: decimal handling errors
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value REAL DEFAULT NULL);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value) VALUES (1, CAST('1.12345' AS REAL));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value) VALUES (2, CAST('1.1234' AS REAL));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value) VALUES (3, NULL);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Inserting decimals with more than four decimal places
